use_cases: Hero section backgrounds with mouse-following gradient effects
Landing page visual enhancement with interactive lighting
Card hover states with dynamic gradient glow effects
Marketing and portfolio sites needing ambient motion backgrounds
Product showcases with premium-feeling interactive visuals
ai_summary: An interactive gradient background component that creates a dynamic, mouse-following light effect. The gradient responds to pointer movement using CSS custom properties, supports configurable intensity from 0 to 1.5, and includes dark mode styling. Uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth performance and respects prefers-reduced-motion accessibility settings. Ideal for creating immersive hero sections and engaging landing page backgrounds.
